name: Midnight Sun · Stockholm Archipelago Sailing Chart
description: Interactive 7-day Stockholm archipelago sailing chart (Aug 2026) with OSM-verified fairways, live SMHI tides, Open-Meteo wind forecast, editable routes and A→B Quick Nav.
